# LeadsPleaseยฎ Solutions

> The LeadsPleaseยฎ Solutions hub โ€” three pillars (Tech, Industries, Applied) covering every vertical and use-case where U.S. mailing-list, business-contact, and intent data drives ROI. Cross-links into the Sales-Garden (reseller program), MCP Server (AI tooling), and Data API (developer integration) sister microsites.

## Pillars
- Tech: Data API, MCP Server, DataWidgetยฎ, integrations
- Industries: real estate, insurance + Medicare, mortgage refi, solar, legal/mass tort, B2B SaaS, automotive, healthcare
- Applied: direct-mail campaigns, AI sales agents, intent-data targeting, list aggregation, T65 Medicare AEP, recurring lead feeds
